steps.title: Connect claim to instance
steps.content: The first sentence states a general principle about random variables clustering around an average over many trials. The second sentence gives a coin-flip scenario as a concrete illustration of that principle.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: A signals addition of a separate point. B signals contrast. D signals comparison between two things. The sentence needs a transition that introduces a specific example of the general claim. The answer is C.
